news.t: ProShares Launches Nasdaq-100 Dorsey Wright Momentum ETF

holdings.infoBox: QQQA is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arm Holdings stock at 8.88%, Marvell Technology at 7.71%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.16%, Intel at 6.57%, and Seagate Technology Holdings at 6.50%.

overview.description: The ProShares Nasdaq-100 Dorsey Wright Momentum ETF (QQQA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ-100 Dorsey Wright Momentum index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 21 non-financial companies included in the Nasdaq-100 Index identified with the highest price momentum. QQQA was launched on May 18, 2021 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches Nasdaq-100 Dorsey Wright Momentum ETF
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares launched the ProShares Nasdaq-100 Dorsey Wright Momentum ETF (Nasdaq: QQQA).
